sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_exists (id Int32, value String);
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM test_exists WHERE value = 'A'), EXISTS(SELECT * FROM test_exists WHERE value = 'D');
SELECT count() FROM test_exists WHERE EXISTS(SELECT id FROM test_exists WHERE value = 'B');
UPDATE test_exists SET value = 'D' WHERE EXISTS(SELECT * FROM test_exists WHERE value = 'C');
